nodes.label: AI as fast literature scanner for data extraction
nodes.grounding_span: AI assisted heavily in finding estimates for prices, such as engine prices, since it could scan a number of research papers for figures much faster than I could manually

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for variety and flow
nodes.grounding_span: I would write each paragraph initially in semi-note form, then ask AI to rewrite this for a professional report

nodes.label: AI reliability for model building
nodes.grounding_span: For the Excel cost model, I found that AI did not create a very reliable model

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness requiring verification
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't trust AI to fully complete any tasks without needed to double check them

nodes.label: AI as formatting tool for graphs
nodes.grounding_span: If AI could work on producing accurate graphs from my data and formatting these to align with a paper

nodes.label: Research efficiency and time saving
nodes.grounding_span: This saved a lot of time in the report writing process

nodes.label: Research integrity and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I would double check these sources to make sure that they were valid and correct

nodes.label: Personal enjoyment of research process
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy the process of conducting the research myself

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI speed in literature scanning
nodes.grounding_span: AI assisted heavily in finding estimates for prices, such as engine prices, since it could scan a number of research papers for figures much faster than I could manually

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI writing assistance
nodes.grounding_span: This saved a lot of time in the report writing process

nodes.label: Negative stance on AI reliability for modeling
nodes.grounding_span: For the Excel cost model, I found that AI did not create a very reliable model

nodes.label: Cautious distrust requiring verification
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't trust AI to fully complete any tasks without needed to double check them

nodes.label: Desire for AI graph formatting tool
nodes.grounding_span: If AI could work on producing accurate graphs from my data and formatting these to align with a paper, this would probably be the most helpful tool I can think of

nodes.label: Iterative verification — double-checking AI outputs against sources
nodes.grounding_span: I would double check these sources to make sure that they were valid and correct

nodes.label: Selective delegation — using AI only for tasks where it is reliable
nodes.grounding_span: I would use AI for much of the original research, making sure to ask for sources for its information
